name: MOTS-c
subtitle: Mitochondrial-Derived Peptide | Metabolic Regulator
aliases: Mitochondrial Open Reading Frame of the 12S rRNA-c

modifications: Encoded by mitochondrial DNA (MT-RNR1 gene) within 12S rRNA

overview: MOTS-c is a mitochondrial-derived peptide that operates as a mitohormone through the Folate-AICAR-AMPK pathway. Under metabolic stress, it translocates to the nucleus to bind stress-response transcription factors (NRF2, ATF1/ATF7), regulating genes involved in metabolism and cellular adaptation.
mechanism: Inhibits the folate cycle leading to AMPK activation. Under metabolic stress, translocates to nucleus to bind stress-response transcription factors, regulating genes involved in metabolism, insulin sensitivity, and cellular adaptation.
keyBenefits: Potential lifespan extension (6.4% median increase in mice)

items.name: Insulin Resistance
items.description: Improves insulin sensitivity by ~30% in animal studies through AMPK activation.

items.name: Type 2 Diabetes Support
items.description: Restores metabolic function via insulin receptor sensitization.

items.name: Obesity Prevention
items.description: Promotes fatty acid oxidation despite identical caloric intake.

items.name: Age-Related Decline Reversal
items.description: Reverses age-dependent physical decline in animal models.

items.name: Mitochondrial Biogenesis
items.description: Enhances mitochondrial function via PGC-1α activation.

items.name: Lifespan Extension
items.description: 6.4% median lifespan extension observed in mice studies.

items.name: Running Performance
items.description: 12-15% improvement in running performance from single dose in studies.

items.name: Muscle Homeostasis
items.description: Exercise induced 11.9-fold increase in skeletal muscle MOTS-c.

items.name: Recovery Support
items.description: Supports muscle recovery and adaptation to exercise.

deliveryMethods.overview: Subcutaneous injection is the primary route. Optimal administration is morning before exercise. AMPK activation occurs within 30 minutes.

steps: Allow vial to reach room temperature (15-20 minutes)
Draw BAC water into insulin syringe
Inject slowly down vial side (not directly onto powder)
Gently swirl until dissolved (never shake vigorously)

keyBenefits: Morning before exercise is optimal timing

interactions.notes: Both activate AMPK; monitor for additive hypoglycemic effects.
Complementary mitochondrial enhancement through different pathways.
Both are AMPK activators; monitor for additive effects.
May require dose adjustments to prevent hypoglycemia.

timeline.effects: AMPK pathway activation; initial glucose tolerance improvements
Enhanced exercise capacity; improved insulin sensitivity
Sustained metabolic benefits; potential body composition changes
Maximum mitochondrial function enhancement; metabolic flexibility

common: Generally well-tolerated in animal studies with minimal side effects
contraindications: WADA prohibited substance (banned for athletic competition)
monitoring: Blood glucose if using diabetes medications

good: White to off-white powder with uniform appearance indicating proper storage
Clear, colorless solution without particles after reconstitution
Sequence verification (MRWQEMGYIFYPRKLR) with CoA >95% purity by RP-HPLC
warning: Limited human clinical data - start conservatively
WADA banned substance - not for competitive athletes

references.title: Obesity and Insulin Sensitivity Study - Lee et al.
references.keyFindings: Prevented obesity, improved insulin sensitivity by ~30% in high-fat diet mice.

references.title: Physical Performance Across Age Groups - Reynolds et al.
references.keyFindings: Enhanced physical performance across age groups; exercise induced 11.9-fold increase in skeletal muscle MOTS-c.

references.title: Nuclear Translocation Study - Kim et al.
references.keyFindings: Nuclear translocation within 30 minutes under metabolic stress.

references.title: Running Performance Study - Hyatt et al.
references.keyFindings: Single dose improved running time 12%, distance 15%.

references.title: Gestational Diabetes Study - Yin et al.
references.keyFindings: Alleviated hyperglycemia in gestational diabetes model.

latestResearch.title: Age-Related Macular Degeneration Study
latestResearch.summary: Dose-dependent protective effects on retinal cells in AMD models.

quickStats.typicalDose: Start 5mg daily, increase to 10-15mg based on goals
quickStats.frequency: Daily for metabolic support, or 3x weekly for anti-aging
quickStats.storage: Refrigerate reconstituted solution at 2-8°C, use within 14 days
